metadata.name: Update DNS Record for a Customer

description: A business customer needs to update the A record for their domain, which is hosted on the telecom's DNS servers.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's identity and their authority to make DNS changes.
Get the domain name, record type (A), and new IP address from the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly gathers the required DNS information.

nodes.task_description: Update the DNS record in the DNS management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the A record.
